metadata.description: Marketplace for pdlc-skills — Product Development Life Cycle workflow for Claude Code.

plugins.name: pdlc
plugins.description: An auditable, on-disk PDLC state machine for AI software engineering: a staged workflow (PRD → design → TDD → implement → review → ship → retro) with hard contracts + objective checks from real exit codes, so an autonomous loop can drive it to convergence unattended (fail-stop / budget guards) — tool-agnostic, richest in Claude Code, plus Codex via adapters.
